conversation_excerpt: User asked: 'reproduce the attention-sink finding from this paper'. I read the paper (Xiao et al. 2023, arXiv:2309.17453), confirmed it uses 2 H100s for a 4-hour run on the Table 3 configuration. Vast.ai currently shows H100 offers at $0.85-1.10/hr verified providers. Estimate 4 hours at $0.90 avg = $7.20 compute, plus ~40% buffer for a possible rerun and for slight overprovisioning, rounding to $10 topup.

cited_files.content_excerpt: Table 3 reports perplexity measurements across 8 model scales on the proof-of-concept streaming benchmark. Training on 2×H100 for 4 epochs (~4h wall time on 70B params).

#!/usr/bin/env python
# Reproduces Xiao 2023 Table 3. Expects 2 GPUs visible.
import torch, transformers
MODEL='meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf'
ASSUME_GPUS=2
# ... checkpointing every 100 steps, resumable, ~4h total.
